reviews.comment:
Muy ambles. Siempre a disposición. Agua caliente para el mate al toque

(Translated by Google)
Very friendly. Always available. Hot water for mate was provided immediately.

reviews.comment:
Tendrían que tener un número de contacto. Mi tarjeta quedó con el playero y no encontré modo de comunicación

(Translated by Google)
They should have a contact number. My card was left with the gas station attendant and I couldn't find a way to get in touch.

They serve well, but they don't accept cards.

reviews.comment:
Están sobre una ruta de viajeros nacionales y extranjeros y NO ACEPTA TARJETAS De CRÉDITO ni DÉBITO... Una vergüenza... Pero si tienen posnet para servicio. En los sanitarios no había agua y en el bar cobran carísimo las bebidas y comidas... No se merece el cartel de ACA.

(Translated by Google)
They're located on a route frequented by both domestic and international travelers and they DON'T ACCEPT CREDIT OR DEBIT CARDS... A disgrace... But they do have a card reader for service. There was no water in the restrooms and the drinks and food at the bar are outrageously expensive... They don't deserve the ACA sign.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBcTZfQ1d3EAE
